original_snippet_context: Discussion about tariffs and their impact on national industries and treasury.
relevant_quote: O quo so não coniprehenden.lo õ que so possa no mesmo tempo servir a Deus o ao dliibo; o pretendam os proteccionlstas do Congresso onça rceber, o portanto restringir a importacão, para que as industrias prosperem e, simuitaneamente, queiram que o Thesouro continua a abastecer-se de recursos nas rendas aduaneiras, das quaes quasi exclusivamente vive!
justification: This quote appears to reflect an orthodox concern by highlighting the seeming contradiction between protectionist policies (which could restrict imports and thus customs revenue) and the treasury's reliance on customs duties.  This aligns with orthodox emphasis on sound fiscal policies and stable government revenue.
